---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem it Solves

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work. Include any API design, expected behavior, or examples.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
